title: lappula tianschanica var. altaica
intro: Lappula tianschanica var. altaica is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the borage family (Boraginaceae). It is native to Central Asia and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antipyretic effects. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, such as fever, digestive problems, and respiratory infections, due to its ability to soothe and calm the body. Lappula tianschanica var. altaica is often prepared as a tincture, tea, or infusion, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health ailments.
